subcodes.first_line: In this day the visible and invisible worlds, the realms of might and dominion, and the domains of utterance and mystic knowledge, are illumined by the effulgent rays of divine light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز عالم ظاهر و باطن و عوالم جبروت و ملکوت و بیان و عرفان از تجلیات انوار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
